name: Sex-pocolypse
description:
World has been taken over by the L-virus, which gives females heightened libido and mutations. See description for mutations

Heavily inspired by 'Nymphopocolypse' from Alef-Yono. I wanted to make my own version

Unsure who artist is, but I found it on r34 and the anime it's from is called "prison school"
creator: LoverOfCats
